text.title: langchain-rag-pipeline Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for langchain-rag-pipeline as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Building a RAG chain that passes the raw retriever output (a list of Documents) directly into the prompt template without a format_docs step.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The prompt template receives a list object, not a string, causing malformed context and degraded generation quality.
